title: Basic Global Thresholding Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps involved in basic global thresholding for image segmentation.
relationships: Process starts with Input Grayscale Image
Image is segmented into foreground and background using T
New means m1 (foreground) and m2 (background) are calculated
New threshold T_new is computed from the means
Process loops back to segmentation until T stabilizes
Final step outputs the Thresholded Binary Image
